zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Griffin於1426年6月5日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook36歲，母親Margaret Pilkington43歲。他和Lady Catherine Curzon至少有5個兒子和10個女兒。他去世於1482年6月6日在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可享年56歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Griffin于1426年6月5日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook36岁，母亲Margaret Pilkington43岁。他和Lady Catherine Curzon至少有5个儿子和10个女儿。他去世于1482年6月6日在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可享年56岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Griffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gruffin, Griffin, a pet form of Middle Welsh Gruffudd. In the Welsh border counties this name was introduced directly from Welsh, and in the eastern counties of England by Bretons from France who came over with the Norman conquest.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha ‘descendant of Gríobhtha’, a personal name from gríobh ‘gryphon’.

variants.name: Griffee
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffy
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffey
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Griffin was born on 5 June 1426, in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Pilkington, was 43. He had at least 5 sons and 10 daughters with Lady Catherine Curzon. He died on 6 June 1482, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Griffin est né le 5 juin 1426, à Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Pilkington, avait 43 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 10 filles avec Lady Catherine Curzon. Il est décédé le 6 juin 1482, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Griffin am 5. Juni 1426 in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Pilkington 43. Er hatte mit Lady Catherine Curzon mindestens 5 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Juni 1482 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Griffin è nato il il 5 giugno 1426 nel Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Pilkington, aveva 43 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 10 figlie con Lady Catherine Curzon. Morì il 6 giugno 1482, nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Griffinが1426年6月5日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリクスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrookは36歳，母Margaret Pilkingtonは43歳であった。彼はLady Catherine Curzonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と10人の娘をもうけた。彼は1482年6月6日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークで56歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Griffin(이)가 1426년 6월 5일 영국 노르섬프토실르 브리스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Pilkington(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Lady Catherine Curzon(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 6월 6일 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Griffin nasceu em 5 de junho de 1426, em Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Pilkington, tinha 43 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 10 filhas com Lady Catherine Curzon. Ele faleceu em 6 de junho de 1482, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Griffin родился 5 июня 1426 г. в местности бриксворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Griffin 1,VIII Lord Latimer of Braybrook было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Pilkington, 43. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 10 дочерей от Lady Catherine Curzon. Он умер 6 июня 1482 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 10 hijas con Lady Catherine Curzon. Murió el 6 de junio de 1482, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
